en: 🎵 I need to know if you're fearing me 🎵
ko: 네가 느끼고 있는 건지 알아야 해, 나는
시간 낭비하고 있어. 네 방식으로 아니면 내 방식으로

en: 🎵 Spend every second with him 🎵 🎵 You're taking what you're given 🎵
ko: 그와 매 순간을 보내. 주어진 걸 받아들이는 거야. 네

en: 🎵 Your mother don't approve of the way that you've been living 🎵
ko: 엄마는 안 좋아해. 네가 사는 방식을. 그가 널 힘들게 한다고

en: 🎵 She says he puts you through it 🎵 🎵 You shouldn't let him do it 🎵
🎵 And if there is a voice in your head don't listen to it 🎵
🎵 My mind is open wide I think of it a thousand times 🎵
ko: 듣지 마. 내 마음은 활짝 열려 있어. 생각해

en: 🎵 That empty space left in my bed from when you stayed the night 🎵
🎵 We were fucked up but you still made sure I stepped on my side 🎵
ko: 우린 엉망이었지만 넌 여전히 내가 내 쪽에서 자게 해줬어

en: 🎵 I still wake up wishing you were there when I opened my eyes 🎵
ko: 여전히 눈을 뜰 때 네가 거기 있길 바라며 깨어나

en: 🎵 I'm trying to understand these things 🎵
